title: Dead Reckoning
description: Displays a compass ribbon in the HUD with Surveyor map markers.
body: (formerly **Antique Atlas Compass HUD** ) ![Screenshot showing compass ribbon with map markers.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd616bf1977d3a3d7fc7c307ac9e996d558f0849.png) Displays a compass ribbon in the HUD with **[Surveyor](https://modrinth.com/mod/surveyor)** map markers. ## Features * Displays a compass ribbon with directions in the HUD. * Displays colored Surveyor markers on the ribbon. * Supports **Antique Atlas 4**, **Hoofprint**, and any other mod that uses Surveyor for waypoints. * All elements of the HUD can be toggled individually. * Can optionally require the player to have a compass item in hand, in the hotbar, or in the inventory to display the ribbon. ## Acknowledgements Inspired by [Chrono's Compass Ribbon](https://modrinth.com/mod/compass-ribbon). Icon: "cartography" by Rofidatul Hasanah from Noun Project (CC BY 3.0)
